overall.description: Third-person game footage of a female character walking across a vast white salt flat desert under a clear blue sky. A large white modern structure is visible in the distant left background throughout the clip. The scene features minimal vegetation and empty terrain.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the flat white terrain toward the distant structure

entered.detail: large white modern architectural structure visible on the horizon
flat white cracked salt flat ground extending to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily across a vast, empty salt flat desert under a clear blue sky. The terrain is flat and white with visible cracking patterns. A large white modern structure remains visible in the distant left background throughout the segment. No other agents or vehicles are present in the open landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a desolate, expansive salt flat under a brilliant blue sky. It begins with the character walking steadily over the stark white terrain, where the ground is marked by intricate cracking patterns. As the camera tracks forward, the vast emptiness of the landscape is emphasized by the absence of any other agents or vehicles. The scene remains focused on this steady progression, keeping a large, modern white structure anchored in the distant left background as the only landmark in the open desert.
